prompt: anna nanna order yelli ide? 3 days late aagide already, tracking update aagtilla
completion: Hi, sorry for the delay. Your order #ORD-48271 is currently at our Hosur sorting facility and will be out for delivery in the next 24 hours. We'll send you an SMS once the delivery partner picks it up.

prompt: Hi, my Myntra-style order #ORD-39815 placed on Monday delivery aagilla yet, ETA enu?
completion: Hi, thanks for reaching out. Your order is currently in transit and the updated ETA is Thursday between 2 PM and 6 PM. You'll receive a tracking link via SMS one hour before delivery.

prompt: guru, refund yavaga barthe? return pickup aagi 5 days aaytu, ondu update illa
completion: Hi, your return for order #ORD-29104 has been received at our warehouse. The refund of ₹1,299 will be credited to your original payment method within 3-5 business days. You'll get a confirmation SMS once initiated.

prompt: size wrong bandide, replace maadbeku, how to do?
completion: Hi, no worries. Please open the order in the app, tap 'Return or Replace', and select 'Wrong size'. A pickup will be scheduled in 24-48 hours and the correct size will be dispatched once we receive the original.

prompt: order cancel maadbeku swalpa urgent, payment already aagide upi alli
completion: Hi, I can help. Order #ORD-58392 has been cancelled. The amount of ₹849 paid via UPI will be refunded to your source account within 2-4 business days.

prompt: delivery partner address tappu pickup maadidru, pin code wrong update aagide app alli
completion: Apologies for the inconvenience. I've corrected the pin code to 560078 on your order. Our team will reach out to the delivery partner to redirect the shipment. You'll receive an updated ETA within 4 hours.

prompt: product damage aagi bandide box open maadidaaga, photo kalisbeka?
completion: Yes please share the photos through the chat. Once received, we'll initiate a replacement immediately and arrange pickup of the damaged item at no cost to you.

prompt: human agent jote maatadbeku, bot helpful agtilla
completion: Sure, I'll connect you to a support executive right away. Average wait time is 3-4 minutes. Please stay on this chat.

prompt: COD order place maadidini but delivery partner extra ₹50 kelthidaane, sariyaa idu?
completion: No, there are no extra charges over the COD amount shown in your order summary. Please do not pay the extra amount. I'm logging a complaint against the delivery partner and will follow up with you within 24 hours.

prompt: shipping charge yaake ₹99 add aagtide ₹500 above order ge bhi?
completion: Hi, the ₹99 shipping fee applies because the order weight exceeds 2 kg. For lighter orders above ₹500, shipping is free. You can review the breakdown under 'Order Summary' before placing the order.

prompt: exchange policy enu? wrong colour bandide, return window mugiyitha?
completion: Hi, our exchange window is 7 days from delivery. Your order was delivered 4 days ago, so you're well within the window. You can request an exchange directly from the order page.

prompt: OTP delivery time alli kelthidaare aadre nange OTP message bandilla, recheck pls
completion: Hi, I've resent the delivery OTP to your registered number ending in **47. Please check your SMS in the next 2 minutes. If still not received, I can share it with you directly here after a quick verification.

prompt: guru, payment fail aaytu but money debit aagide. helpu maadi swalpa
completion: Hi, sorry for the trouble. Failed UPI payments are auto-reversed by your bank within 3-5 working days. Please share your UTR or transaction reference and I'll escalate it to our payments team to fast-track.

prompt: Sir, UPI transaction failed but amount deducted from my SBI account. Refund yavaga sigatte?
completion: Hi, I understand the concern. Failed UPI debits are automatically reversed by the issuing bank, typically within T+3 working days. If not credited by then, please raise a complaint on the BHIM/UPI helpline with your UTR and we will support the dispute.

prompt: double charge aagide, ondu order ge ₹599 erdu sari debit aagide
completion: Hi, apologies for the inconvenience. I can see two debits of ₹599 against the same order #ORD-77241. I've initiated a refund of ₹599 for the duplicate charge. It will reflect in 3-5 business days.

prompt: wallet balance show aagtilla home screen alli, refresh maadidru same
completion: Hi, please log out of the app, clear cache, and log back in. If the wallet balance still doesn't refresh, share a screenshot and I'll escalate it to our tech team.

prompt: auto pay setup maadidini but mandate fail aagtide every month, yaake?
completion: Hi, this usually happens when the registered card has insufficient balance, has expired, or your bank has flagged the mandate. Please re-create the auto-pay mandate from Profile > Subscriptions, and ensure the funding source is active.

prompt: bro, transaction limit cross aagtide ₹10k crossed for the day, increase maadi
completion: Hi, daily UPI transaction limits are set by your bank, not by us. Please contact your bank's customer care to request a higher limit. Most banks allow up to ₹1 lakh per day on UPI.

prompt: fraud transaction aagide, ₹2,500 debit aagide nange gottilla
completion: I'm sorry to hear that. For your safety, please immediately call your bank's 24/7 fraud helpline to block the account or card. Then raise a dispute through your bank — we'll cooperate fully with any investigation. Please also report the transaction in the app under Help > Report fraud.

prompt: credit card add maadtide app alli but verify aagtilla, OTP barthilla
completion: Hi, please ensure the mobile number on the card matches your registered number. If yes, request the OTP again after 60 seconds. If still not received, please add the card via the bank's net banking flow as a fallback.

prompt: cashback yavaga credit aagatte? 7 days aaytu transaction maadi
completion: Hi, cashback is credited within 7-10 business days from the eligible transaction date. Your cashback of ₹40 against transaction on 22nd will reflect by next Tuesday.

prompt: agent jote connect maadi, payment issue ide urgent, money stuck aagide
completion: Connecting you to a payments specialist now. Average wait is under 2 minutes. Please keep your transaction reference handy.

prompt: yenu maadtidira, 1 hour aaytu food bandilla, swiggy
completion: Hi, very sorry for the delay. Your order is currently 8 minutes away based on the delivery partner's location. As a goodwill gesture I've added a ₹50 credit to your wallet for the next order.

prompt: order cancel maadi please, restaurant call maadtilla 30 min aaytu
completion: I understand. I've cancelled order #FD-91824 and a full refund of ₹420 has been initiated to your source account. It will reflect in 3-5 business days.

prompt: anna delivery boy rude aagi maatadidaane, wrong food kotbittu hogidaane
completion: I'm really sorry about the experience. I've logged a formal complaint against the delivery partner and initiated a full refund of ₹385 along with a ₹100 goodwill credit. Our quality team will follow up within 24 hours.

prompt: biryani spicy ankondu order maadidvi, but it came absolutely bland, refund pls
completion: Apologies for the experience. I've initiated a full refund of ₹275 for the order. It will reflect in your wallet instantly or in your source account in 3-5 days. We've also flagged the feedback to the restaurant.

prompt: missing item ide order alli, paratha banndilla but invoice alli charge aagide
completion: Sorry about that. I've initiated a refund of ₹60 for the missing paratha. It will reflect in your wallet in 5 minutes. Please reach out if you spot anything else missing from your order.

prompt: address change maadbeku, wrong location alli order book aagide
completion: Hi, I can update the delivery address only if the restaurant hasn't started preparation yet. Let me check… preparation has started, so I'm unable to change the address. I can either deliver to original address or cancel with full refund — which would you prefer?

prompt: coupon code apply aagtilla checkout alli, FIRST50 valid alva?
completion: Hi, FIRST50 is valid only for first-time users. Since you've ordered with us before, this code won't apply. You can use NEW20 for a 20% discount up to ₹100 on this order.

prompt: veg ankondu order maadidvi nonveg bandide, kya yaar serious issue
completion: I'm extremely sorry — this is a serious lapse. I've initiated a full refund of ₹520, added a ₹150 goodwill credit, and escalated this to the restaurant for immediate corrective action. Our food safety team will follow up within 12 hours.

prompt: subscription cancel maadbeku, monthly charge mathe aagide
completion: Hi, I've cancelled your subscription effective the next billing cycle. You'll continue to have benefits till 28th of this month. The charge already debited will not be refunded as per the subscription terms.

prompt: rider OTP kelthane irre but nange OTP gottilla, location nange gottilla alli kuda
completion: Hi, I've shared the OTP 4471 with the rider directly. They'll deliver to the address registered. If you need to update the drop point, please share the location pin in this chat.

prompt: Trip end aagillada bill bartide, ₹340 charge aagide, fix maadi
completion: Hi, I see the trip was auto-ended after 90 minutes of inactivity, which triggered the fare. I've reviewed the GPS log — the trip ended at your drop location. I've adjusted the fare to ₹185 and refunded the difference of ₹155 to your wallet.

prompt: driver alli baralilla 20 min aaytu, cancel maadthini fee bartha?
completion: Hi, since the driver has not reached the pickup in over 15 minutes, you can cancel without any cancellation fee. I'll waive it from our side as well if any charge appears.

prompt: wallet alli ₹230 ittu trip ge use aagilla, cash kotbittu, pls credit back
completion: Hi, on cash trips wallet balance is held but not deducted. The hold of ₹230 will be auto-released within 24 hours. Let me know if it doesn't reflect by tomorrow same time.

prompt: lost item alli, phone bittidini car alli, driver phone uttkothilla
completion: I'm sorry to hear that. I've logged a lost-item report against trip #TR-29104 and shared the driver's contact via SMS to your registered number. If unreachable for over 30 minutes, our recovery team will personally call the driver and assist.

prompt: fare estimate ₹180 ittu but final ₹290 charge aagide, surge yelli show aagilla
completion: Hi, the trip ran 3.2 km longer than the estimated route due to a route change requested mid-trip. The fare difference is genuine, but if you believe the route change wasn't requested by you, I'll review the audio/GPS log and update.

prompt: agent jote maatadbeku, sefty issue aagide trip alli
completion: Connecting you to our 24/7 safety response team immediately. Please share your trip ID and current location while I transfer.

prompt: auto driver double charge maadtidaane app fare ₹120 but ₹200 kelthidaane
completion: Please pay only the in-app fare of ₹120. Refuse any extra charge. I've logged a report against the auto driver and you'll receive a follow-up SMS from our team within 4 hours.

prompt: recharge maadidini ₹239 plan, but data sigthilla, network full ide
completion: Hi, the ₹239 plan is activated but data may take up to 4 hours to provision after recharge. Please toggle airplane mode once and recheck. If data is still not available after 4 hours, share your number and I'll escalate.

prompt: broadband down aagide morning indha, when will it be back?
completion: Hi, there's a fibre cut reported in your area (560066). Restoration is currently in progress and the ETA is by 6 PM today. You'll receive an SMS once the connection is restored.

prompt: bill enaadru jaasti bandide e tinglu, charges break-up koDi
completion: Hi, your bill is ₹687 — base plan ₹499, OTT add-on ₹99, taxes ₹89. The OTT add-on was activated on the 5th of this month from your app. You can disable it from My Plan > Add-ons.

prompt: port out maadbeku, UPC code yenu kalsbeku?
completion: Hi, to port out, send PORT to 1900 from your number. You'll receive a UPC code via SMS, valid for 4 days. Submit this code at the new operator's store along with KYC documents.

prompt: international roaming on maadbeku, Dubai hogtiddini next week
completion: Hi, I've activated international roaming on your number. The ₹2,999 weekly Dubai pack gives you 1 GB data, 100 mins outgoing, 100 SMS. Let me know if you'd like to subscribe.

prompt: OTT subscription cancel maadbeku, every month charge aagtide ₹149
completion: Hi, I've removed the OTT add-on from your plan. The cancellation will take effect from the next billing cycle (5th May). Your current cycle's benefits will continue till then.

prompt: agent connect maadi, OTP issue ide login aagtilla account ge
completion: Connecting you to a support executive now. Please keep your registered number and last recharge details handy for verification.

prompt: neft transfer pending status alli ide 2 days inda, when will it credit?
completion: Hi, NEFT transfers usually settle within a few hours but can take up to T+1 working day during high volume periods. Your transfer of ₹15,000 is pending review with the beneficiary bank. I'll escalate and update you within 4 hours.

prompt: anna card block maadi, lost aagide debit card
completion: Done. I've blocked your debit card ending in **4729 with immediate effect. A replacement card will be dispatched to your registered address within 5-7 working days. No further transactions will be allowed on this card.

prompt: passbook update aagtilla, last 3 months entries kaanstilla
completion: Hi, please visit any home branch with your passbook for a manual update. Online passbook entries are also available in the app under Accounts > Statement. If you face issues there, share a screenshot.

prompt: FD premature close maadbeku, penalty ento?
completion: Hi, premature closure of your FD will incur a 1% penalty on the applicable rate for the period the FD was held. Your effective interest will be 5.5% instead of 6.5%. The maturity amount after penalty will be approximately ₹1,03,400.

prompt: atm alli money debit aaytu but cash banndilla, kya kar raha hai bro
completion: I understand the frustration. Failed ATM withdrawals are auto-reversed by the bank within T+5 working days. Please raise a complaint with the ATM ID, transaction time, and amount. I've already escalated on your behalf — you'll get an update within 48 hours.

prompt: kyc update maadbeku, address change aagide bengaluru ge
completion: Hi, you can update your KYC by uploading your new address proof (Aadhaar/utility bill) under Profile > Update KYC in the app. The update will be reflected within 2 working days post verification.

prompt: credit limit increase maadi, salary jaasti aagide naan submit maadbekaa documents?
completion: Hi, yes — please upload the latest 3 months' salary slips and bank statement under Card > Limit Enhancement. The review takes 7 working days and the revised limit will be communicated via SMS.

prompt: appointment slot Monday 10am book maadidvi but cancel aagide message bartide, yaake?
completion: Hi, your appointment was auto-cancelled because the doctor is on emergency leave today. Please reschedule from the app — I've added a priority flag so you'll see the next available slots first.

prompt: test reports yelli sigatte? blood test maadi 3 days aaytu
completion: Hi, your reports for visit on 27th are ready. They've been emailed to the registered ID and are also available under My Records > Reports in the app. Let me know if you need a hard copy.

prompt: doctor slot reschedule maadbeku, work emergency ide tomorrow
completion: Hi, I've cancelled tomorrow's slot without any charge given the short notice. The next available slot with the same doctor is on Friday at 11:30 AM and Saturday at 4:00 PM. Please confirm which works.

prompt: insurance cashless approve aagtilla 3 days aaytu, hospital wait maadtide
completion: I'm sorry for the delay. I've raised a priority escalation to the cashless desk. The TPA has been instructed to revert within 2 hours. You'll receive an update on registered number ending in **18.
